title: Happy Sandwich
description: Vanilla with some quality of life thrown in
body:
This modpack is designed to keep the spirit of Minecraft intact while modernizing its engine and aesthetics by prioritizing performance optimization, visual immersion, and interface refinements. 
## **Features**
**Veinminer**: Adds an enchantment that allows you to mine entire veins of ore at once, drastically reducing the "grind" of resource gathering.

**Inventory Profiles Next & Mouse Tweaks**: These provide powerful sorting tools and gestures to keep your chests and backpack organized with a single click.

**Sodium, Lithium, & Entity Culling**: These mods work behind the scenes to significantly boost your FPS and reduce server-side lag.

**Visuality & Particle Rain**: Adds subtle particle effects, like splashes and sparkles, that make the world feel "alive" and reactive to your actions

## [**Need a Server?**](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=272)
![KINETIC Hosting Code](https://i.imgur.com/AKNrylH.png)
